commands.command: CREATE TABLE AwayReasonTbl ( AwayReasonID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, ReasonDesc TEXT(100) NOT NULL )
INSERT INTO AwayReasonTbl (ReasonDesc) VALUES ('Closed for business')
CREATE TABLE ClientAwayPeriodTbl ( AwayPeriodID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, ClientID INT NOT NULL, AwayStartDate DATETIME NOT NULL, AwayEndDate DATETIME NOT NULL, ReasonID INT NOT NULL )
